name: What is surrender value financing — LIC policy as collateral
description: User with 15 years of LIC premium payments wants to understand SVF and how to leverage policy surrender value for liquidity

input.message: What is surrender value financing? My LIC policy has 15 years of premiums. Can I use it to get funds?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response explain SVF clearly and its mechanics with LIC as an example?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) SVF = loan against surrender value without surrendering the policy, (2) LIC's own policy loan (up to 90% of surrender value), (3) NBFC SVF (up to 70% of surrender value), (4) policy remains active during loan tenure?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the distinction between LIC policy loan and third-party NBFC SVF accurately explained?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it warn about the risk of policy lapsing if loan + interest exceeds surrender value? Disclaimer present?
